descriptionShort: Dave Tomlinson scores late goal to give Richmond Sockeyes 5-4 victory over Humboldt Broncos.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-4 in a playoff game on April 30, 1987. Dave Tomlinson scored the game-winning goal with 2:37 remaining in regulation time to break a 4-4 tie. The victory secured Richmond's berth in the Centennial Cup tournament.

attribution.headline: Richmond Sockeyes Defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-4 to Earn Centennial Cup Berth
